title: Mt. Gox moves $739M in Bitcoin from cold wallets: Arkham
summary: Mt. Gox moves $739M in Bitcoin from cold wallets: Arkham
briefing: Mt. Gox moved $739 million in Bitcoin for the first time since March, raising speculation about imminent creditor distributions.

title: Bitcoin price falls under $70K as crypto markets liquidate $800M
summary: Bitcoin price falls under $70K as crypto markets liquidate $800M
briefing: Bitcoin fell to fresh two-month lows as BTC price weakness accelerated and analysis targeted its 200-day moving average trend line.

title: Robinhood enters Canada after $180 million WonderFi acquisition
summary: Robinhood enters Canada after $180 million WonderFi acquisition
briefing: Robinhood will enter Canada after its WonderFi acquisition brought local crypto exchanges Bitbuy and Coinsquare under its control.

title: Bitcoin falls to 2-month low as divergence from equities widens
summary: Bitcoin falls to 2-month low as divergence from equities widens
briefing: Santiment says that “the gap between traditional equities and crypto has become increasingly difficult for traders to ignore.”

title: Grayscale HYPE ETF ‘likely imminent’ as new update shows competitive fee: Analyst
summary: Grayscale HYPE ETF ‘likely imminent’ as new update shows competitive fee: Analyst
briefing: Grayscale proposed a fee of 0.29% on its Hyperliquid ETF, which “slightly undercuts” rivals 21Shares and Bitwise that carry respective fees of 0.3% and 0.34%, says analyst James Seyffart.

title: TON jumps 15% as The Open Network plans rebrand to Gram
summary: TON jumps 15% as The Open Network plans rebrand to Gram
briefing: Telegram founder Pavel Durov says it is “returning to our roots — and starting a new chapter” by rebranding Toncoin to Gram.

title: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
summary: Bitmine buys $52M ETH as Tom Lee says price not yet showing Ethereum’s strength
briefing: Bitmine is aiming to hold 5% of the total circulating supply of 120.6 million Ether tokens and is about 90% of the way to its target after its latest purchase.

title: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale causes clash for $80M in Polymarket bets
summary: Strategy’s Bitcoin sale causes clash for $80M in Polymarket bets
briefing: A clash has erupted among Polymarket users over the timing and disclosure of a recent Bitcoin sale by Strategy, with more than $80 million traded on the disputed outcome.

title: Nvidia Releases Its Best Open AI Model Yet—But Still Lags Behind China
summary: Nvidia Releases Its Best Open AI Model Yet—But Still Lags Behind China
briefing: Nvidia's Nemotron 3 Ultra tops every American open-weight AI system by a wide margin—but still trails the Chinese-led frontier.

title: DuckDuckGo Launched Duck AI. Now Their Hit Product is 'No AI'
summary: DuckDuckGo Launched Duck AI. Now Their Hit Product is 'No AI'
briefing: As Google buries its search results under AI-generated answers, DuckDuckGo believes a growing number of users just want the old internet back.

title: TON Price Pumps After Telegram CEO Says Token Will Be Rebranded to Gram
summary: TON Price Pumps After Telegram CEO Says Token Will Be Rebranded to Gram
briefing: Telegram is taking the reins of The Open Network, years after abandoning the project—and it plans to adopt Toncoin's originally planned name.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Warns $1.75 Billion IPO Investors of Potential Future Share Dilution
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX Warns $1.75 Billion IPO Investors of Potential Future Share Dilution
briefing: SpaceX's amended IPO filing signals the company may issue substantial new shares in future transactions as Elon Musk expands its ambitions.

title: Trump’s Business Partner Teases Future Meme Coin Plans: 'We’re The Biggest Brand on Earth'
summary: Trump’s Business Partner Teases Future Meme Coin Plans: 'We’re The Biggest Brand on Earth'
briefing: Bill Zanker, a longtime Trump associate, will take the top 19 holders of the president’s meme coin to the World Cup Finals next month—and has plans for ongoing exclusive events.

title: Strategy's Bitcoin Sale Timing Throws $50 Million Polymarket Bet Into Dispute
summary: Strategy's Bitcoin Sale Timing Throws $50 Million Polymarket Bet Into Dispute
briefing: Polymarket users are waiting for a resolution on whether Strategy's Bitcoin sale took place before the end of May—with over $50 million bet so far.

summary: Kalshi Eyes Perpetual Futures for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin—And These Altcoins
briefing: Kalshi moved swiftly to lock down an emerging market for perpetual futures in the U.S., filing to certify a slate of altcoin offerings

title: Florida Sues OpenAI, Sam Altman Over ChatGPT Safety Claims
summary: Florida Sues OpenAI, Sam Altman Over ChatGPT Safety Claims
briefing: Florida's attorney general seeks damages, restrictions on ChatGPT, and personal liability for OpenAI CEO Sam Altman in what the state describes as the first state-led lawsuit against the AI company.
